title: Replace logo with newly uploaded image across all app locations

requirements.text: Replace the current logo image (lit-heaven-logo-visible.dim_400x400.png) in the Navigation component with the newly uploaded logo file (Brown_Retro_Book_Store_Logo_20260224_152956_0000-removebg-preview.png), saved as a new asset in frontend/public/assets/generated/. Ensure proper sizing and responsive behavior across desktop and mobile viewports.

quotes: Replace the logo in each and every page a place of the app you placed

acceptanceCriteria: The new logo image is saved as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated/
Navigation component references the new logo file and displays it correctly on both desktop and mobile
Logo is properly sized and does not overflow or appear distorted

requirements.text: Update the favicon reference in frontend/index.html to use the newly uploaded logo image (Brown_Retro_Book_Store_Logo_20260224_152956_0000-removebg-preview.png) stored under frontend/public/assets/generated/.

quotes: Replace the logo in each and every page a place of the app you placed

acceptanceCriteria: The <link rel='icon'> in frontend/index.html points to the new logo asset path
The favicon displays the new logo in the browser tab

requirements.text: Update the BooksPage hero banner to use the newly uploaded logo image (Brown_Retro_Book_Store_Logo_20260224_152956_0000-removebg-preview.png) wherever the previous logo was referenced.

quotes: Replace the logo in each and every page a place of the app you placed

acceptanceCriteria: BooksPage hero banner displays the new logo image
Image renders correctly at all viewport sizes

requirements.text: Audit all other frontend components (Footer, ProfileSetupModal, authentication pages, and any remaining components) for references to the old logo (lit-heaven-logo-visible.dim_400x400.png) and update each to use the newly uploaded logo image.

quotes: Replace the logo in each and every page a place of the app you placed

acceptanceCriteria: No component references the old logo file lit-heaven-logo-visible.dim_400x400.png
All logo instances across the app consistently display the new uploaded logo

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Store the new logo as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated/ — do not route it through the backend
nonGoals: Changing the app name or branding text
Modifying backend logic or data models
Redesigning page layouts beyond logo placement

edits: Re-render with warm brown tones and improved contrast so the open book illustration and 'Lit-Heaven' text are clearly visible on both light and dark backgrounds (Brown_Retro_Book_Store_Logo_20260224_152956_0000-removebg-preview.png > lit-heaven-logo-new.dim_400x400.png)
